hotelNames.title: Hotel names
hotelNames.description: Hotel names to research. Add city/country in the location field for better matching.

listingUrls.title: Hotel listing URLs
listingUrls.description: Public hotel listing URLs from travel platforms. The Actor will look for hotel names and public outbound website/contact links.

websiteUrls.title: Known hotel website URLs
websiteUrls.description: Optional known hotel websites to scan directly for contact pages, emails, phones, and social links.

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional city, region, or country used to improve search accuracy.

findContactPage.title: Find contact page
findContactPage.description: Scan the official website for a public contact page.

findEmails.title: Find public emails
findEmails.description: Extract only publicly visible email addresses from hotel websites/contact pages.

findPhones.title: Find public phones
findPhones.description: Extract only publicly visible phone numbers from hotel websites/contact pages.

findSocials.title: Find social links
findSocials.description: Extract publicly linked social profiles from hotel pages.

deduplicateResults.title: Deduplicate results
deduplicateResults.description: Remove duplicate hotels/websites from the output.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify proxy configuration. Useful for reliable public web requests.

debugMode.title: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Save extra request/debug information to the key-value store.
